meaning: n.雪橇,摘棉v.乘雪橇,用雪橇运,用摘棉机摘
examples: Children are playing in a sled.
He carries presents on his sled.
Anna slides in a snow sled.
Opportunity to ride a dog sled or just meet and greet the huskies without sledding.
This was good practice for playing alpha sled dog, and required a lot of aggressive shouting.
